description.unified: Deals of Attack Power as Magic Damage to an enemy and restores HP equal to 25% of the damage dealt. For [15 sec->6 sec], reduces the target's Attack by [(added) 20%] and increases your Attack by [4%->10%]. The Attack increase effect stacks up to [6->5] times.

Moves to the farthest enemy and deals of Attack Power as Magic Damage to the target and nearby enemies, increasing their Magic Damage taken by [20%->35%] for 5 sec [(removed) and reduces Status Resistance by 320]. If enemies remain nearby after using the skill, additionally uses [Absorbing Strike].
Deals of Attack Power as Magic Damage 4 times to enemies within range. You cannot be affected by status ailments while casting, and all damage taken is reduced by [60%->50%].
When an enemy is killed, all skill cooldowns are reduced by 30%, and [Harvest] is stacked 1 times. [Harvest]: For [(added) 12 sec], Attack increases by 80(1+0.3Skill Level), stacking up to 10 times.

dark.unified: Mana cost is [(added) increased by 1000], but cooldown is reduced by [2 sec->3 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is [(added) reduced by 1000] [(removed) Damage increases by 50%].

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [2000->1000], but damage is increased by [(added) 80%] [(removed) after using a skill, if there are nearby enemies, additionally uses Absorbing Blow].

light.unified: DMG is [reduced by 30%, but the number of hits is doubled -> increased by 40%].

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1000->2000], but [Harvest] is triggered once.

light.unified: Mana recovery per second is increased by [10%->50%] per stack.

dark.unified: If stacks are [6->5] or more, cooldown is additionally reduced by 1 sec every second.

When hitting with a skill, reduces the target's Magic Defense by [(added) 6%] and increases your Attack by [4%->6%] for [(added) 10 sec]. This effect stacks up to [5->6] times [(removed) and Armor Penetration by 4%].

description.unified: On hit, has a 25% chance to deal additional Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase your Attack by {1}%. The Attack increase stacks up to [5->10] times.
